flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Colorado State University Pueblo rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($15.7k → $17.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Colorado State University Pueblo fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Colorado State University Pueblo rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 (20.8% → 24.4%).
